name: MIB-626 plus exercise phase 2 registry
summary: Completed phase 2 registry testing MIB-626 with and without high-intensity multidimensional exercise training in healthy participants, with no posted registry results.
population: Healthy participants in a MIB-626 and exercise-training trial

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists actual completion on Aug. 4, 2025, but no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is the most direct pending MIB-626 functional/exercise trial-watch record.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
